children.heading: Preservation of existing Pecos National Monument and related resources
children.label: a Preservation of existing Pecos National Monument and related resources
children.text: In order to enhance and preserve the existing Pecos National Monument and related nationally significant resources for the benefit and enjoyment of present and future generations, there is hereby established the Pecos National Historical Park (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “park”).

children.heading: Park boundaries
children.label: b Park boundaries
children.text: The park shall include the existing Pecos National Monument and the area known as the Forked Lightning Ranch which surrounds the Pecos National Monument and shall consist of approximately 5,865 acres of the lands and interests in lands as generally depicted on the map entitled “Pecos National Historical Park Boundary Concept”, numbered 430/80028 and dated March 1990. The map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the offices of the National Park Service, Department of the Interior. The Secretary of the Interior (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Secretary”) may from time to time make minor revisions in the boundary of the park in accordance with .section 100506(c) of title 54

children.heading: Availability of monument funds for park purposes
children.label: c Availability of monument funds for park purposes
children.text: The Act entitled “An Act to authorize the establishment of Pecos National Monument in the State of New Mexico, and for other purposes” approved (), is hereby repealed, and any funds available for purposes of the Pecos National Monument shall be available for purposes of the park.June 28, 196579 Stat. 195
